subject: Re: Its a boy..
body:
great... news  one day later and it would have had to compete with Ghislaine for attention

----- Original Message ----
From: "richarddavidkahn@yahoo.com" <richarddavidkahn@yahoo.com>
To: Jeffrey Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>; Darren Indyke <dkiesq@aol.com>; Lesley Groff <lesley@nysgllc.com>
Sent: Tuesday, December 25, 2007 4:35:04 PM
Subject: Its a boy..

Lisa and I are proud to announce the arrival of our son Max Griffin Kahn. He was born on 12/24/07 at 3:12am. He was 6 pounds 14 oz and 20 inches long. Lisa and Max are doing great. 

I will be out of the office for the remainder of the week. I have contacted Bella who has plans for Wednesday afternoon but is available for the remainder of the week if needed. Please feel free to contact me at anytime if necessary. 

Rich
Sent from my Verizon Wireless BlackBerry
